name: Hamburger Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute ground beef, onion, and 2/3 of the mushrooms in a skillet until the beef is well browned. Drain off fat.
2. Add salt, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, and biscuit mix to the meat mixture. Spread in pastry-lined pan.
3. Beat eggs lightly, add cottage cheese, and mix well. Pour over meat mixture.
4. Garnish with remaining mushrooms.
5. Bake in a 375°F oven for 30 minutes. Serve the quiche hot.
